summary: Completion audit found the artifact-handling routine was still plan-level guidance rather than an executable gate, so a Worker slice was required before JSC-331 could be considered complete.

Implemented executable artifact-routine gate, wired CLI registry and command capability metadata, added docs and ubiquitous-language coverage, updated active artifact routing, and added focused tests including stale index, missing ownership, missing references, runtime artifact, unclassified status, glob scope, early not_run, and reordered Local Status cases.

Completed requested 3-agent review pass, reran authenticated CodeRabbit after user-approved external transfer, fixed both adversarial medium findings, remediated valid CodeRabbit major/trivial findings, verified the minor tooling-policy finding was already aligned, and reran focused plus fast validation successfully. No Linear, git, heartbeat, staging, commit, push, or PR mutation was performed.
